zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Trenchard於大約1465年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯塔普萊頓時，他的父親Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton37歲，母親Eleanor Filiol17歲。他於1482年之前與Ann de la Lynde在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年在英國多瑟特享年86歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Trenchard于大约1465年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯塔普萊頓时，他的父亲Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton37岁，母亲Eleanor Filiol17岁。他于1482年之前与Ann de la Lynde在英国英格兰多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年在英国多瑟特享年86岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Trenchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’ (compare Trench ) + the suffix -ard, for someone skilled in cutting, perhaps for a swordsman, butcher, or ditch-cutter.

variants.name: Trench
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English trench ‘path cut through woods; cutting or ditch’ (Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived by a path or ditch, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Trench Lane in Huddington (Worcestershire), Trench in Ellesmere (Shropshire), or The Trench in Hildenborough (Kent). It may perhaps also be a nickname for someone who cut ditches.
Irish (of French origin): habitational name from La Tranche (Poitou).

History: The Trench family that hold the Irish earldom of Clancarty trace their descent from Frederic de la Tranche, who settled in Northumbria from France c. 1575. They became established in Ireland in the 17th century, when Frederick Trench went there and purchased an estate in Galway in 1631.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Trenchard was born about 1465, in Stapleton, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor Filiol, was 17. He married Ann de la Lynde before 1482, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1550, in Dorset, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Trenchard est né environ 1465, à Stapleton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Filiol, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Ann de la Lynde avant 1482, à Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1550, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Trenchard um 1465 in Stapleton, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor Filiol 17. Er hat vor 1482 in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Ann de la Lynde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1550 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Dorset, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Trenchard è nato il circa 1465 nel Stapleton, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Filiol, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Ann de la Lynde prima del 1482, nel Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1550, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Trenchardが約1465年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスタプレトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolvertonは37歳，母Eleanor Filiolは17歳であった。1482年以前にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでAnn de la Lyndeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年にイギリスドールセトで86歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Trenchard(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 그루스스터실르 스타플레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Filiol(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1482년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Ann de la Lynde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 영국 도르세트에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Trenchard родился около 1465 г. в местности стаплетон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Filiol, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann de la Lynde перед 1482 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

Se casó con Ann de la Lynde antes de 1482, en Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
